In addition recoil compensation makes weapon bulkier and more difficult to conceal: apply -3 TN Moditier t0 tne Perception Check any character trying spot such concealed weapon; Sonic Stunner The sonic stunner; like the stunstick; i5 nonlethal weapon meant render target unconscious It projects an ultra high frequency sound that can stun or knock out the target.
